mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member (login_id, email, password, nickname, name, gender, age, provider, profile_complete, created_at, updated_at, is_deleted) VALUES (#{loginId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{provider}, #{profileComplete}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, false)
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET nickname = #{nickname}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, profile_complete = true, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{memberId}
